message:
Fix GitHub Pages deployment to include clip.wasm

- Add clip.wasm to the _site folder in pages.yml workflow
- Update default dataset URL to use new laion-1m-clip-openai.lance

files.patch:
@@ -37,6 +37,7 @@ jobs:
           mkdir -p _site
           cp examples/wasm/index.html _site/
           cp examples/wasm/lanceql.js _site/
+          cp examples/wasm/clip.wasm _site/
           cp zig-out/bin/lanceql.wasm _site/
 
       - name: Upload artifact
